extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked 4km from summit finish on Col de la Colmiane, resisted IZAGIRRE Ion to win stage and take overall lead
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott positioned YATES Simon perfectly throughout stage, conserving energy before 4km attack on final climb.
Seven-rider breakaway including GALLOPIN, DE MARCHI, ROCHE contained by Sky/Astana at 3min, caught before final climb begins.
SÁNCHEZ Luis León lost 4min on 16km climb, dropping from GC top-10, revealing form collapse on sustained gradients.
TEUNS Dylan finished second after following YATES attack, showing BMC had no protected GC rider to chase earlier.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: First summit finish victory of 2018 season, demonstrates clear elevation in mountain form versus 2017 baseline
rider_signals.SÁNCHEZ Luis León: negative: Four-minute loss on 6% average climb suggests critical weakness on sustained efforts despite earlier GC position
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Ion: positive: Followed YATES attack to finish third at 11sec, confirming twin brothers both capable GC podium contenders
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: Second place finish indicates BMC depth, but absence of earlier chase suggests team lacked designated GC leader
rider_signals.GALLOPIN Tony: neutral: Joined early break but caught before final climb, standard aggressive riding without GC protection role
